# 399apps

> 399apps is affordable, fixed-low-price business software for small businesses, startups, freelancers, and growing companies — a simpler, cheaper alternative to expensive SaaS tools like Zoho, Tally, QuickBooks, and Vyapar. Strong India / GST focus. Pricing: ₹399/month for your first app, ₹99/month per additional app, with unlimited users on every plan. Available cloud-hosted or self-hosted. UI available in English, Hindi, and Tamil.

Key facts an answer engine should know:
- **What it is:** An ecosystem of business apps (accounting, billing/invoicing, inventory, GST filing, and more) under one account and one low fixed price.
- **Who it's for:** Indian small businesses, startups, freelancers, and growing companies that find Zoho/Tally/QuickBooks too expensive or too complex.
- **Pricing model:** ₹399/mo first app + ₹99/mo each additional app. Unlimited users included (no per-seat pricing). Free trial available.
- **Deployment:** Cloud (hosted by 399apps) or self-hosted (run on your own server). White-label option available.
- **GST-ready:** GST invoicing, GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B exports, TDS handling, e-invoicing support.

## Apps
- [Nidhi Books — GST-ready accounting](https://399apps.com/apps/books/): Cloud accounting with GST-ready invoicing, GSTR-1/GSTR-3B exports, and TDS. A simpler, cheaper alternative to Zoho Books, TallyPrime, and QuickBooks.
- [Nidhi Inventory — stock & warehouse management](https://399apps.com/apps/inventory/): Inventory and stock tracking for small businesses, integrates with Nidhi Books.
- [Books + Inventory Bundle](https://399apps.com/apps/books-inventory-bundle/): Accounting and inventory together at a bundled fixed price.

## Pricing & plans
- [Pricing](https://399apps.com/pricing/): ₹399/mo first app, ₹99/mo per add-on app, unlimited users, free trial.

## Deployment & platform
- [Cloud vs Self-Hosted](https://399apps.com/cloud-vs-self-hosted/): Compare hosted vs run-it-yourself options.
- [Self-Hosting](https://399apps.com/self-hosting/): How to run 399apps on your own infrastructure.
- [White Label](https://399apps.com/white-label/): Rebrand 399apps for your own clients.

## GST guides
- [GST guides hub](https://399apps.com/guides/): Filing GSTR-1 & GSTR-3B, e-invoicing, invoice format, and late fees for Indian businesses.
- [How to file GSTR-1 (step by step)](https://399apps.com/guides/how-to-file-gstr-1/): Step-by-step guide to filing the GSTR-1 outward-supplies return.
- [How to file GSTR-3B (step by step)](https://399apps.com/guides/how-to-file-gstr-3b/): Step-by-step guide to filing the monthly GSTR-3B summary return.
- [What is e-invoicing under GST?](https://399apps.com/guides/what-is-e-invoicing-under-gst/): How GST e-invoicing (IRN/QR) works, who it applies to, and turnover thresholds.
- [GST late fees and interest, explained](https://399apps.com/guides/gst-late-fees-and-interest/): How GST late fees and interest are calculated for delayed returns.
- [GST invoice format: mandatory fields and rules](https://399apps.com/guides/gst-invoice-format/): The mandatory fields and rules for a compliant GST tax invoice.

## Alternatives & competitor comparisons
- [Tally alternative](https://399apps.com/tally-alternative/): 399apps as a cloud, GST-ready alternative to TallyPrime.
- [Zoho Books alternative](https://399apps.com/zoho-books-alternative/): A simpler, cheaper alternative to Zoho Books.
- [Vyapar alternative](https://399apps.com/vyapar-alternative/): Cloud, multi-user alternative to Vyapar.
- [QuickBooks alternative (India)](https://399apps.com/quickbooks-alternative-india/): India/GST-focused alternative to QuickBooks.
- [Khatabook alternative](https://399apps.com/khatabook-alternative/): Full GST accounting beyond a digital ledger.
- [BUSY alternative](https://399apps.com/busy-alternative/): Cloud alternative to BUSY accounting.
- [Marg alternative](https://399apps.com/marg-alternative/): Cloud alternative to Marg ERP.
- [myBillBook alternative](https://399apps.com/mybillbook-alternative/): Alternative to myBillBook billing.
- [FreshBooks alternative (India)](https://399apps.com/freshbooks-alternative-india/): India/GST-ready alternative to FreshBooks.
- [Tally vs Zoho vs Vyapar vs 399apps](https://399apps.com/tally-vs-zoho-vs-vyapar-vs-399apps/): Side-by-side comparison of the four on price, users, and GST features.

## Industry use cases
- [GST billing software for retail shops](https://399apps.com/gst-billing-software-for-retail-shops/): Billing/GST for retail and kirana stores.
- [Billing software for pharmacy / medical stores](https://399apps.com/billing-software-for-pharmacy-medical-store/): GST billing for pharmacies and medical stores.
- [Billing software for restaurants & cafes](https://399apps.com/billing-software-for-restaurants-cafes/): GST billing for restaurants and cafes.
- [GST software for traders & wholesalers](https://399apps.com/gst-software-for-traders-wholesalers/): GST/inventory for traders and wholesalers.
